prompt: Our voice AI bot is being scaled to other brands. Before we do that, I need to understand if the current implementation is actually helping customers or just frustrating them more. Can you analyze our call data and tell me - what's the resolution rate? What's the customer satisfaction? Which specific issues are causing the most problems? I need this in Excel format with call IDs so I can audit individual cases.

assertions.name: metrics-clearly-presented
assertions.description: Excel includes resolution rate, CSAT, and issue breakdown metrics

assertions.name: call-auditing-enabled
assertions.description: Call IDs present for drilling into individual cases

assertions.name: negative-sentiment-identified
assertions.description: Negative sentiment calls are clearly flagged for review
